prs_created.description: build: update bundled pkg.m4 from serial 1 (0.24) to serial 12 (0.29.2) + api: add const to libspectrum_creator getter function parameters
prs_created.note: Two commits in one patch. Maintainer can apply with git am.

checked_off_by_maintainer: Apply patch for CI typo fix + macOS autoreconf cleanup (applied as commit 24bfa0d)
Apply patch for new buffer tests (test_83, test_84) - applied as commit 0cee5e9
Apply patch to upgrade SourceForge URLs from http to https - applied as commit 03276e4
notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected - GitHub Actions cannot push them; safeoutputs creates a patch for manual application. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4), CI typo fix (24bfa0d), buffer set/append tests (0cee5e9), HTTPS URLs (03276e4). Task 1 labelling is a no-op (no unlabelled issues). Buffer functions fully tested (tests 77-84). Creator getter const-correctness patch pending (2026-04-08). Next runs: consider tests for creator.c functions, snap_accessors, tape_accessors, IDE functions, microdrive functions. Also consider updating m4/ax_create_stdint_h.m4 if newer version found.
